targetOwner: NONE_WITH_REASON: no unified Web inventory surface exists for all 186 governance/compat checkers
missingEdge: Web Operations exposes only a bounded 5-job-type subset with exactly one checker (check_docs_governance_compat.py) wired directly into a job definition; the other 185 checkers have no Web-surfaced readout.
impact: CI_REPO_GATE class checkers remain CLI/receipt-visible only, not Web-operator-visible; this is a visibility gap, not an execution gap.

closeCondition.conditionText: A fresh Deliverable B or maintenance packet implements a unified Web readout surface covering all governance/compat checkers and is accepted by governed review.

reopenCondition.conditionText: Reopen only when (a) an operator-authorized product or release requirement names Web-surfaced visibility for a specific additional checker or checker family beyond the current bounded five-job-type subset, or (b) a governed packet materially expands the Web job-type registry (EXTENSIONS/CVF_v1.6_AGENT_PLATFORM/cvf-web/src/lib/server/web-governance-jobs.ts) beyond its current five entries for reasons other than this GAP. Operator interest alone, without a named product/release requirement or a materially expanded job registry, is insufficient.

actionOwner: PARKED_WITH_REASON: explicit future gap per R91 Lane 5; not authorized by this wave; strengthened concrete reopen trigger recorded by SCLP-T5
